rounds: The 6am necklace with zero deliberation? That was Matt's. The painted toes on a Saturday? Also Matt's. Standing in a chemist comparing nail shades without flinching — he didn't even look around first. Those are all wins, and they're not small ones. The joy police showed up this week but they lost every single one of those rounds.
pattern: They're loudest before the moment — once Matt's already doing the thing, they go quiet.
focus: Himbo Trial — wear one visibly gay piece outside the house this week, something that reads before you open your mouth.
